checks.description: Ensure sequence_detected is never asserted unless the full 4-bit pattern 1001 has been observed.
checks.pass_condition: sequence_detected may transition high only after the detector has seen the exact 1001 bitstream; any high without this pattern violates the property.
checks.trigger_condition: When any change on sequence_detected is observed.

checks.description: Validate that after reset release, the detector can accept a 4-bit stream and eventually assert sequence_detected.
checks.pass_condition: sequence_detected transitions from low to high at least once after the 1001 pattern is presented, without requiring a specific cycle count.
checks.trigger_condition: When the 4-bit pattern 1001 has been driven on data_in.
